response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content to identify song performances and MC sections. 2. Identified songs 'ノンブレス・オブリージュ' (Non-breath oblige) and 'ray' from on-screen text. 3. Confirmed original artists: PinocchioP for 'ノンブレス・オブリージュ' and BUMP OF CHICKEN for 'ray'. 4. Performed lyric searches for both songs using original artists, without quotes. 5. Mapped timestamps to scenes. 6. Corrected final end time to match the actual video duration (05:00.048). 7. Generated JSON based on detected metadata.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Fuuma Iroha performing two vocal songs, 'Non-breath oblige' and 'ray', as part of her birthday live event in 2026, interspersed with MC segments.
